{{Quote|There's a deranged Rodian back there with a blaster, and he's shooting at everybody|[[U-THR]]|<ref name="Crimson Jailbreak">{{JournalCite|5|Crimson Jailbreak}}</ref>}}
This '''angry individual''' was an aggressive [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] who resided in [[Byblos Starport Tower 214|tower 214]] on [[Byblos/Legends|Byblos]]. The Rodian, who disliked [[Droid/Legends|droids]], may unwillingly have been part of [[U-THR]]'s scheme to liberate [[Crimson]] from [[Imperial Office of Customs/Legends|Imperial Customs]]. It is possible that U-THR provoked the Rodian to chase him into the Imperial Custom's office to create a diversion, providing Crimson with the chance to escape.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The reader has a choice of using the angry Rodian to create a diversion as one of the possibilities of the solitaire story ''[[Crimson Jailbreak]]''. Another option consists of reprogramming a [[Binary loadlifter/Legends|binary loadlifter]].
